race.comment: The well-related BREAK FREE (14) (half to G3 winner Snapped) boasts a win over this sprint journey and only went down by the narrowest of margins at Doomben at the latest effort. Can go one better against this line-up. TOWN CRIER (1) resumes here but has revved up for this with two recent trials and gets some weight off with the 3kg claim. Can feature despite the sticky draw. ISTI STAR (13) on the back of a minor placing at Eagle Farm lined up in a Listed Race last time and finished 6 lengths from the winner in 11th at Eagle Farm over 1000m. Finds a more suitable assignment and look for a big run. FIRST MISSION (9) best of the rest in a race with a stack of chances.
